ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock market data */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "daily_return" REAL /* Daily return of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid by the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol to monitor for the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, volume increase) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., data download, alert set) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "browser_info" TEXT /* Browser information for analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date of the stock market data
Highest price of the stock during the day
Lowest price of the stock during the day
Volume of shares traded during the day
Adjusted closing price of the stock
Sector to which the stock belongs
